name: convertTimestampToNS
title: convertTimestampToNS
syntax: Int64 convertTimestampToNS ( dword days, dword hours, dword minutes, dword seconds );
description: Converts a time stamp given in days, hours, minutes and seconds into a nanosecond time stamp.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of the time stamp.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours of the time stamp.

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Number of minutes of the time stamp.

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: Number of seconds of the time stamp.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
